name: DoIP_DataInd
title: DoIP_DataInd
syntax: void DoIP_DataInd( byte buffer[], dword count, dword ecuAddress, dword testerAddress);
description: This callback is called from the DoIP layer when new data is received.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Size of the received data in bytes.

parameters.name: ecuAddress
parameters.description: Logical DoIP address of the ECU the data was sent to

parameters.name: testerAddress
parameters.description: Logical DoIP address of the tester that sent/received the data. (Note: before 8.2 SP4 the value of testerAddress is 0 always.)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
